name: The Golf Academy
about: The Golf Academy is a comprehensive training facility offering a roadmap to success for golfers of all ages and abilities. With year-round programs, students receive mental coaching, tournament scheduling, fitness training, and lesson plans, all supported by state-of-the-art technology. The Academy operates in Louisville, KY and Rochester, NY, with campuses at 1252 Elmore Dr and 8014 Vinecrest ave. It provides professional instruction from highly trained and experienced teachers, utilizing advanced equipment to measure and improve every aspect of a player's game.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art technology including Trackman and Foresight GC Quad for precise game analysis
Comprehensive programs covering mental coaching, fitness, and tournament preparation
Expert navigation through the college recruiting process with specialized advisors
Flexible booking options for group and individual sessions via MindBody

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor for ball and club tracking
Photometric camera launch monitor with advanced ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The academy provides club fitting services and recommends bringing your own clubs for personalized sessions, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, though BYOB policies aren't explicitly addressed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Standard simulation times aren't specified, but sessions are booked hourly through their MindBody system.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Academy offers specialized junior programs including middle school training and elite youth development.
